blockingIssues.description: packages/telemetry/src/span.ts does not record the required durationMs span attribute, so the telemetry helper does not fully satisfy the feature's expected behavior.

packages/ssh/src/live.ts applies timeoutMs as a whole-process execFile timeout, so long-running commands on a healthy SSH connection are killed and misreported as ConnectionTimeout instead of enforcing a connection-timeout-only contract.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md with current Effect conventions: Schema imports from effect, typed errors use Data.TaggedError, and custom tracers must be installed with Layer.setTracer(...).
Updated .factory/library/environment.md with Turbo's root packageManager requirement discovered during foundation scaffolding.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception path for scaffolding/bootstrap features that cannot realistically start with red tests, and require workers to mark skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false when they deviate from the default TDD flow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-monorepo-setup, foundation-core-package, and foundation-ssh-package all reviewed worker transcripts that created implementation files before tests while handoffs still reported full procedure compliance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh mission guidance to match the current Effect conventions: import Schema from effect (not @effect/schema) and align examples with the Data.TaggedError pattern used in the codebase.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-monorepo-setup, foundation-core-package, and foundation-ssh-package all reported stale shared guidance while current code uses Schema from effect and Data.TaggedError-based errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that custom Effect tracers must be installed with Layer.setTracer(...) when tests or helper layers need Effect.withSpan to emit spans.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-telemetry-package reported that the worker had to discover Layer.setTracer(...) during debugging before telemetry tests collected spans correctly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the telemetry span-attribute requirements so VAL-INFRA-012 and the feature definition consistently state whether durationMs is mandatory.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-telemetry-package found that features.json requires durationMs while validation-contract.md only lists host, operation, and exitCode.

rejectedObservations.observation: foundation-core-package reported stale Effect Schema guidance in shared state.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; consolidated into the AGENTS.md guidance recommendation and library architecture update

rejectedObservations.observation: foundation-ssh-package reported stale architecture notes about Data.TaggedEnum and @effect/schema.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; consolidated into the AGENTS.md guidance recommendation and library architecture update
